name: AIV Core Object
description: Design-driven AIV internal object pattern with separate Ascend 910B and 950B presets. 910B renders only the simplified internal Scalar + UB + Vector topology; chip-level MTE/MTE3 transport routes belong to memory-architecture. 950B renders DCache, ICache, ND-DMA Cache, Scalar, UB, SIMT, SIMD, and Vector topology.

visualContract: official Ascend documentation for AIV topology and SIMT/SIMD shared resources

useWhen: building an AIV internal memory and vector object in PTO
creating architecture pages that need a dark Ascend-style vector-core composition
reusing AIV shell layout and routes without hand-copying static HTML
allowedOverrides: title, variant, labels, capacities, and card membership
grid rows, cols, cell size, gap, and highlighted band columns
runtime local buffer-block state through setBufferBlocks payloads
route list, route color family, and route anchor bias
forbiddenOverrides: rewriting the shell layout in page-local CSS
replacing official topology-derived routes with ad hoc demo lines
hard-coding a one-off copy of generated DOM instead of using the shared renderer
mutating generated grid cells from product pages instead of calling setBufferBlocks
agentReuseRule: Read this JSON first. For a new page, load pattern.js and call window.PtoAivCorePattern.render with ascend910b or ascend950b, or pass a config object. Use ascend910b for simplified 910B AIV diagrams and ascend950b for full 950B AIV diagrams. Extend preset data for future chip variants instead of cloning the generated DOM.
